Bash(LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/home/rpeters1428:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH CUMINATION_ALLOW_PLAYWRIGHT=1 python3 - <<'PYEOF'
import os, sys, re, json
sys.path.insert\(0, 'plugin.video.cumination/resources'\)
sys.path.insert\(0, 'plugin.video.cumination'\)

from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

print\("=" * 70\)
print\("INVESTIGATING: javseen.tv"\)
print\("=" * 70\)

with sync_playwright\(\) as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch\(headless=True, executable_path="/usr/bin/chromium"\)
    context = browser.new_context\(
        user_agent="Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/121.0.0.0 Safari/537.36"
    \)
    page = context.new_page\(\)
    
    print\("\\n[1] Fetching listing page: https://javseen.tv/recent/"\)
    page.goto\("https://javseen.tv/recent/", wait_until="domcontentloaded", timeout=30000\)
    page.wait_for_timeout\(3000\)
    html = page.content\(\)
    
    print\(f"    Page HTML length: {len\(html\)}"\)
    
    # Try to find .video elements
    video_items = page.locator\(".video"\).all\(\)
    print\(f"    .video elements found: {len\(video_items\)}"\)
    
    thumbnail_links = page.locator\(".video a.thumbnail"\).all\(\)
    print\(f"    .video a.thumbnail links found: {len\(thumbnail_links\)}"\)
    
    # Try broader search
    all_links = page.locator\("a[href*='javseen.tv']"\).all\(\)
    print\(f"    All javseen.tv links: {len\(all_links\)}"\)
    
    # Get first 3000 chars of body HTML to see structure
    body_html = page.evaluate\("document.body.innerHTML"\)[:4000]
    print\(f"\\n    Body HTML \(first 4000 chars\):\\n{body_html}"\)
    
    video_url = None
    if thumbnail_links:
        href = thumbnail_links[0].get_attribute\("href"\)
        video_url = href if href and href.startswith\("http"\) else "https://javseen.tv" + \(href or ""\)
        print\(f"\\n    First video URL: {video_url}"\)
    elif video_items:
        # Try to get any link inside video items
        for item in video_items[:5]:
            href = item.locator\("a"\).first.get_attribute\("href"\)
            if href and \("/v/" in href or "/video/" in href or re.search\(r'/\\d+/', href\)\):
                video_url = href if href.startswith\("http"\) else "https://javseen.tv" + href
                print\(f"\\n    Found video URL from .video item: {video_url}"\)
                break
    
    browser.close\(\)

print\(f"\\n\\n[JAVSEEN] Video URL for next phase: {video_url}"\)
PYEOF)
